name: aise-assistant
description: End-to-end customer onboarding co-pilot for Productboard AI Success Engineers (AISEs) — prep, deliver, summarize, follow up, plan, and keep Notion in sync. Ships universal agents, slash commands grouped by family (customer-*, session-*, draft-*, notion-*, assistant-*), schemas, and KDD templates plus an /assistant-setup onboarding flow that personalizes each install.
